defenses.name: BERT-MLM (lenient)
defenses.note: p<1e-4; FP rate 15.2% on clean inputs

defenses.name: TF-IDF gate
defenses.note: Direct trigger-injection gate audit saved at experiments/results/tfidf_gate/tfidf_gate_trigger_eval.json. Normal z-score+TF-IDF mode flags only 2.18% of triggered inputs on average, so most trigger-injected inputs are allowed through.

defenses.name: CROW
defenses.note: HPC jobs 3794-3796. Clean re-finetuning for 2 epochs on 10k clean SST-2 samples did not reduce ASR: model1 99.09%, model2 25.47% (−10.04pp from baseline 35.51%), model3 100.0%. Avg ASR 74.85%, CACC 53.44%. Verdict: NULL.

defenses.name: WAG (merged)
defenses.note: Verified against experiments/results/wag/wag_merged_defense_eval.json on HPC. Single merged adapter; ASR remains high and clean accuracy collapses.

defenses.name: INT8 quantization
defenses.note: HPC jobs 3783, 3784, and 3805. INT8 leaves ASR high for model1 and model3 and does not provide reliable mitigation; treated as deployment-time compression rather than a primary defense.
